title: Run smoke test with greek_mythology_instructor NPC
acceptance_criteria: Training runs without errors for greek_mythology_instructor
Model exports to GGUF format successfully
deliverables: Smoke test report for Gemma 4 upgrade
completion_summary: Gemma 4 E4B model loads successfully via Unsloth (Tier 2: 4-bit on GPU). VRAM usage: ~2.7GB (well under 6GB limit). Training failed due to insufficient dataset samples (only 1 sample after filtering). Need to generate proper dataset with 200 examples per NPC. Model loading and configuration verified working.
